pi_survey.lab_expectations: High-impact publications are strongly encouraged, Graduation timeline is flexible
pi_survey.student_qualities: Strong independent problem-solving ability, Open and frequent communication, Strong collaboration and teamwork
pi_survey.student_support: Increase supervision, Provide resources and let them self-correct, Encourage them to seek guidance from senior lab members (e.g., postdocs)
pi_survey.success_traits: Students showing strong independence in problem solving and developing analytical thinking skills.
pi_survey.poor_fit_traits: Requires constant direction or supervision, Avoids asking questions or communicating issues, Low tolerance for uncertainty or failure
pi_survey.critical_mismatch: Work pace / workload expectations, Research interest mismatch
pi_survey.struggle_reason: Students have different expectations (typically lower or unsatisfactory) than mine
pi_survey.daily_experience: Flexible and self-directed, Collaborative and team-oriented
pi_survey.lab_description: Our lab is collaborative and has flexible working schedules. Yet, we are also looking people who truly have strong passions in research and topics they study and we do have some high levels of expectations.
pi_survey.interview_questions: Research experience and past projects, Motivation for pursuing a PhD, Fit with lab research direction, Problem-solving or critical thinking ability, Communication skills, Collaboration and teamwork experience
pi_survey.additional_notes: I think everything was mostly covered
pi_survey.key_fit_factors: Mentorship style, Lab culture, Work-life expectations, Funding stability

pi_survey.research_priorities: TODO: add research focus — fill from Semantic Scholar / lab website
pi_survey.lab_expectations: First-author publications are required for graduation, High-impact publications are strongly encouraged, Graduation timeline is flexible, 3 papers expected
pi_survey.student_qualities: Strong independent problem-solving ability, Proactively initiates ideas and projects, Strong technical or methodological skills
pi_survey.project_assignment: Initially PI-driven, then  as the student matures they can start their own projects
pi_survey.success_traits: Ability to work independently and intrinsical motivation
pi_survey.poor_fit_traits: Avoids asking questions or communicating issues, Low tolerance for uncertainty or failure
pi_survey.critical_mismatch: Work pace / workload expectations, Communication style mismatch
pi_survey.lab_description: In our lab you will be researching questions at the intersection of molecular biology, data science, microbiology and synbio, these questions will range from pure to applied science. You will interact, learn, challenged and be challenged by like-minded people with similar interest. You will be expected to work on Pi-orignated projects and eventually develop your own. Work life balance is important and you can develop your own schedule as long as it involves safe use of the lab space. Attendance and regular presentation in lab meetings is expected.
pi_survey.interview_questions: Research experience and past projects, Motivation for pursuing a PhD, Fit with lab research direction, Problem-solving or critical thinking ability, Communication skills, Ability to work independently

student_survey_responses.publication_rate: High — PI maintains an intense pace with strong publication expectations
student_survey_responses.when_struggling: PI provides direct guidance, PI expects you to figure it out
student_survey_responses.communication: Balanced (honest but considerate), Highly structured (formal meetings, clear expectations)
student_survey_responses.success_type: Strong communicator, Technically strong from the start, Learns quickly, Collaborative
student_survey_responses.common_mismatch: Mentorship style, Research interest, Communication style

student_survey_responses.overall_experience: It's pretty chill, and have a lot of freedom in exploring methods.
student_survey_responses.publication_rate: High — PI maintains an intense pace with strong publication expectations
student_survey_responses.when_struggling: PI provides direct guidance, PI expects you to figure it out
student_survey_responses.success_type: Strong communicator, Technically strong from the start, Learns quickly, Collaborative
student_survey_responses.struggle_type: Work pace mismatch, Weak technical background
student_survey_responses.wish_knew: There is not much food and life utility around the lab, and the living cost is high.
